title: Im Lost.. (The Broken Script)
description: Sweet little pack that makes you feel eerie
body:
A Simple Horror-Modpack that Focues around [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)

#
### IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE PLAYING

- Mod can ban you from your world
- Mod can crash the game
- Mod can still can create txts on your desktop
- Mod can shake your game window
- Mod can create custom error popups on your desktop
- Mod WILL grief your world
- Mod WILL destroy your buildings
- DO NOT PLAY THIS MOD WITH SHADERS THAT CHANGE TEXTURE OF THE MOON
- DO NOT PLAY THIS MOD WITH WORLD GEN MODS! (Some events will break right now)
- The "unsafe" version of the mod has been discontinued.


The Broken Script is a (VERY) slow horror mod that will try to make you feel paranoid. There are random events, few entities and anomalies (and much more)

To access mod config use /tbs_config
#
### Other Mods

- Basic Weapons -> adds a bunch of simple weapons for extra fun
- Ore Excavation -> mines all ores in a radius if holding the key (default: R)
- Falling Tree -> when mining a tree with an axe, the whole tree will fall instantly
- Structure Mods
